title: FogFree
description: Removes fog and chunk fade-in from the game.
body:
FogFree is a simple client-side mod that removes fog and chunk fade-in effects.
- Removes environmental and render distance fog
- Disables chunk fade-in when new chunks load
- Preserves sky horizon blending for a better look

![FogFree No chunk fade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfbf1dd6b4f05eb4ffb79a85853ff7f18ca060b0.gif)
FogFree installed, no fog or chunk fade.

![FogFree Overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d902aac7c3bcddf2768f15f758c4fc5e060843e.webp)
![FogFree Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d290178889adf500416a30fcc9f52b87c787139.webp)
